title: La barraca
writer: Libertad Blasco Ibáñez, Vicente Blasco Ibáñez, Tito Davison
actors: Domingo Soler, Anita Blanch, Amparo Morillo
plot: In rural Spain, a new family arrives in town to work a parcel (barraca), the townsfolk are very hostile to the idea of "another" working the land that once belonged to one of them.
